title: Palindrome check
prompt: Write is_palindrome(s) returning True if s reads the same forwards and backwards, ignoring case and spaces.

tests.call: is_palindrome('Was it a car or a cat I saw')

details.restate: Answer True if the text reads the same forwards and backwards once you ignore capital letters and spaces; otherwise False.

io.because: ignoring the space and the capitals, it's racecar both ways

terms.meaning: text that reads the same in both directions, like level or racecar
